notes: biolink:has_phenotype; METPO:1005017 confirmed in metpo.owl (label "Voges-Proskauer test positive"); prior kgmicrobe.trait:voges_proskauer_test_positive was incorrect; lit-audit: was METPO:1005017 'Voges-Proskauer test positive' (a positive outcome); subject is the assay itself — METPO:1005016 is the test concept
METPO:2000517 grows in; selective/differential medium for Gram-negative enteric bacteria; not in MediaDive catalog so emitted as kgmicrobe.medium:* placeholder
METPO:2000517 grows in; generic blood agar (specific Columbia/Heart Infusion variants live as mediadive.medium:* nodes when present); placeholder until a generic blood agar medium IRI is available

METPO:2000065 does not tolerate; routes the susceptibility-to-bile-acid trait through the new chemical-tolerance predicate pair (organism --METPO:2000065--> CHEBI:3098 bile acid). Supersedes kgmicrobe.trait:bile_susceptible (placeholder for the now-removed proposal classes METPO:1007051/1007056). For majority=false rows the metatraits transform tries _get_negative_predicate(METPO:2000065) which is NOT METPO:2000064 here (because 2000065 is the negative-pair member, not the positive); the row is silently dropped, matching the prior behaviour of the kgmicrobe.trait:bile_susceptible encoding.
